notes: AH3 Hub v1.8.4.86 - AI Studio v2.3.1 Cap nhat 06/04/2026 Smart Merge v1.4.0: Truoc day khi merge model tu I2A, he thong quet toan bo texture trong scene de relink - co the anh huong vat lieu khong lien quan. Gio chi quet texture cua model vua merge. Ngoai ra toi uu pham vi tim texture - bo qua scan khi thu muc cha la goc o dia. Sua menu chuot phai I2A hien sai chuc nang theo loai asset (VD: file nen texture truoc hien
). Nhan dien file nen chua .vrscene la model. Dem chinh xac anh loi khi index. Cap nhat: Settings > Check for Update
